explanation: Aperture, Shutter Speed, ISO, and Focal Length are fundamental settings or characteristics that directly control how a camera captures an image. A Tripod is an accessory used for stabilization, not a direct image capture control.

category: Signatories of the Declaration of Independence
explanation: George Washington, John Adams, Thomas Jefferson, and Benjamin Franklin were all signatories of the United States Declaration of Independence. Abraham Lincoln was not alive during its signing.
All tokens except 'CHAIR' contain the consecutive letters 'EAR' within them. HEART (hEARt), PEARL (pEARl), BEARD (bEARd), and EARLY (EARly) all share this feature, while CHAIR does not.
